# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: 1
  DOCKER_DRIVER: overlay2
  SECURE_LOG_LEVEL: info

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

.mr_info:
  before_script:
    - |
      # Sanitize MR title and description to prevent injection attacks
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        export SAFE_MR_TITLE=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 ._-]//g' | cut -c1-100)
      else
        export SAFE_MR_TITLE="Direct commit"
      fi
      
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" ]; then
        export SAFE_MR_DESCRIPTION=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 ._\n-]//g' | cut -c1-500)
      else
        export SAFE_MR_DESCRIPTION="No description provided"
      fi
      
      # Create safe deployment tag
      export DEPLOYMENT_TAG=$(echo "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${SAFE_MR_TITLE}" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/ /-/g' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9._-]//g' | cut -c1-63)
      
      # Create release notes file
      export RELEASE_NOTES_FILE="release-notes-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.txt"
      
      echo "=== Deployment Information ===" > $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "Branch: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "MR Title: ${SAFE_MR_TITLE}" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "MR IID: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-N/A}" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "Author: ${GITLAB_USER_NAME}" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "Date: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "=== Description ===" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "${SAFE_MR_DESCRIPTION}" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE

validate:security:
  stage: validate
  extends: .mr_info
  script:
    - |
      # Validate MR title format
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        if echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | grep -qE '(;|\||&|`|\$\(|<|>)'; then
          echo "ERROR: MR title contains potentially dangerous characters"
          exit 1
        fi
      fi
      
      # Check for secrets in MR description
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" ]; then
        if echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" | grep -qiE '(password|secret|api[_-]?key|token|credential).*[:=].*[a-zA-Z0-9]{8,}'; then
          echo "WARNING: MR description may contain sensitive information"
        fi
      fi
      
      echo "Security validation passed"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"

build:application:
  stage: build
  extends: .mr_info
  image: docker:24-git
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  script:
    - |
      # Build with sanitized labels
      docker build \
        --label "git.commit=${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" \
        --label "git.branch=${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}" \
        --label "mr.title=${SAFE_MR_TITLE}" \
        --label "mr.iid=${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-none}" \
        --label "build.date=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" \
        --tag "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}" \
        --tag "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:latest" \
        .
      
      # Login to registry securely
      echo "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" | docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" --password-stdin "$CI_REGISTRY"
      
      # Push images
      docker push "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}"
      docker push "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:latest"
      
      # Save deployment tag for later stages
      echo "${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}" > deployment_tag.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deployment_tag.txt
      - $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
    expire_in: 1 week
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"

test:unit:
  stage: test
  extends: .mr_info
  image: node:18-alpine
  script:
    - |
      npm ci
      npm test
      
      # Generate test report with MR info
      echo "Test Report for: ${SAFE_MR_TITLE}" > test-report.txt
      echo "Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" >> test-report.txt
      echo "Tests completed successfully" >> test-report.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test-report.txt
    reports:
      junit: test-results.xml
    expire_in: 1 week
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"

deploy:staging:
  stage: deploy
  extends: .mr_info
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - !reference [.mr_info, before_script]
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq git
    - export DEPLOYMENT_TAG=$(cat deployment_tag.txt)
  script:
    - |
      # Create deployment record
      DEPLOYMENT_JSON=$(cat <<EOF
      {
        "environment": "staging",
        "tag": "${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}",
        "commit": "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}",
        "mr_title": "${SAFE_MR_TITLE}",
        "mr_iid": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-null}",
        "deployed_by": "${GITLAB_USER_LOGIN}",
        "deployed_at": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
      }
      EOF
      )
      
      # Validate JSON before using
      echo "$DEPLOYMENT_JSON" | jq empty || exit 1
      
      # Deploy to staging (example with kubectl)
      # kubectl set image deployment/myapp myapp=${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}
      
      echo "Deployed to staging with tag: ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}"
      echo "$DEPLOYMENT_JSON" > deployment-info.json
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
    deployment_tier: staging
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deployment-info.json
    expire_in: 30 days
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH

deploy:production:
  stage: deploy
  extends: .mr_info
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - !reference [.mr_info, before_script]
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq git
    - export DEPLOYMENT_TAG=$(cat deployment_tag.txt)
  script:
    - |
      # Create Git tag with MR information
      git config --global user.email "ci@gitlab.com"
      git config --global user.name "GitLab CI"
      
      # Create annotated tag with release notes
      TAG_NAME="release-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      TAG_MESSAGE="Release: ${SAFE_MR_TITLE}

Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
MR: !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-N/A}
Deployed by: ${GITLAB_USER_LOGIN}
Date: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)

${SAFE_MR_DESCRIPTION}"
      
      # Sanitize tag message
      SAFE_TAG_MESSAGE=$(echo "$TAG_MESSAGE" | sed 's/[`$]//g')
      
      # Create and push tag securely
      git tag -a "${TAG_NAME}" -m "${SAFE_TAG_MESSAGE}" "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" || true
      
      # Deploy to production
      DEPLOYMENT_JSON=$(cat <<EOF
      {
        "environment": "production",
        "tag": "${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}",
        "release_tag": "${TAG_NAME}",
        "commit": "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}",
        "mr_title": "${SAFE_MR_TITLE}",
        "mr_iid": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-null}",
        "deployed_by": "${GITLAB_USER_LOGIN}",
        "deployed_at": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
      }
      EOF
      )
      
      echo "$DEPLOYMENT_JSON" | jq empty || exit 1
      echo "$DEPLOYMENT_JSON" > production-deployment.json
      
      echo "Deployed to production with tag: ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}"
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
    deployment_tier: production
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - production-deployment.json
    expire_in: 1 year
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: manual
  needs:
    - deploy:staging

notify:slack:
  stage: notify
  extends: .mr_info
  image: curlimages/curl:latest
  before_script:
    - !reference [.mr_info, before_script]
  script:
    - |
      if [ -z "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
        echo "SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL not configured, skipping notification"
        exit 0
      fi
      
      # Determine deployment status
      if [ "$CI_JOB_STATUS" = "success" ]; then
        STATUS_EMOJI=":white_check_mark:"
        STATUS_COLOR="good"
      else
        STATUS_EMOJI=":x:"
        STATUS_COLOR="danger"
      fi
      
      # Create Slack message with escaped JSON
      SLACK_MESSAGE=$(cat <<EOF
      {
        "username": "GitLab CI",
        "icon_emoji": ":gitlab:",
        "attachments": [
          {
            "color": "${STATUS_COLOR}",
            "title": "${STATUS_EMOJI} Deployment Notification",
            "fields": [
              {
                "title": "Feature",
                "value": "${SAFE_MR_TITLE}",
                "short": false
              },
              {
                "title": "Environment",
                "value": "${CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME:-N/A}",
                "short": true
              },
              {
                "title": "Commit",
                "value": "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}",
                "short": true
              },
              {
                "title": "Branch",
                "value": "${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}",
                "short": true
              },
              {
                "title": "Deployed By",
                "value": "${GITLAB_USER_LOGIN}",
                "short": true
              },
              {
                "title": "Pipeline",
                "value": "<${CI_PIPELINE_URL}|View Pipeline>",
                "short": false
              }
            ],
            "footer": "GitLab CI/CD",
            "ts": $(date +%s)
          }
        ]
      }
      EOF
      )
      
      # Validate and send
      echo "$SLACK_MESSAGE" | grep -q "SAFE_MR_TITLE" || exit 1
      
      curl -X POST \
        -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
        --data "$SLACK_MESSAGE" \
        "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: on_success
  needs:
    - job: deploy:staging
      optional: true
    - job: deploy:production
      optional: true

notify:email:
  stage: notify
  extends: .mr_info
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - !reference [.mr_info, before_script]
    - apk add --no-cache curl
  script:
    - |
      # Create email notification body
      EMAIL_BODY="Deployment Notification

Feature: ${SAFE_MR_TITLE}
Environment: ${CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME:-N/A}
Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
Branch: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}
Deployed By: ${GITLAB_USER_LOGIN}
Pipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}

Description:
${SAFE_MR_DESCRIPTION}

Release Notes:
$(cat $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE)
"
      
      echo "$EMAIL_BODY" > email-notification.txt
      echo "Email notification prepared"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - email-notification.txt
    expire_in: 7 days
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: on_success

generate:release_notes:
  stage: notify
  extends: .mr_info
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - !reference [.mr_info, before_script]
    - apk add --no-cache git jq
  script:
    - |
      # Aggregate release notes from all deployments
      RELEASE_VERSION="v$(date +%Y.%m.%d)-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      
      cat > RELEASE_NOTES.md <<EOF
      # Release Notes - ${RELEASE_VERSION}

      ## Feature: ${SAFE_MR_TITLE}

      **Merge Request:** !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-N/A}
      **Commit:** ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
      **Branch:** ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}
      **Author:** ${GITLAB_USER_NAME}
      **Date:** $(date -u +%Y-%m-%d)

      ## Description

      ${SAFE_MR_DESCRIPTION}

      ## Changes

      - Deployment Tag: ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}
      - Pipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}

      ## Deployment Information

      $(cat $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE)

      ---
      *Generated automatically by GitLab CI/CD*
      EOF
      
      cat RELEASE_NOTES.md
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - RELEASE_NOTES.md
    expire_in: 1 year
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH

create:gitlab_release:
  stage: notify
  image: registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/release-cli:latest
  extends: .mr_info
  before_script:
    - !reference [.mr_info, before_script]
  script:
    - |
      RELEASE_TAG="release-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      RELEASE_NAME="${SAFE_MR_TITLE} - ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      
      # Create release description
      RELEASE_DESC="## ${SAFE_MR_TITLE}

**Merge Request:** !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-N/A}

### Description
${SAFE_MR_DESCRIPTION}

### Deployment Details
- Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
- Branch: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}
- Deployed by: ${GITLAB_USER_LOGIN}
- Pipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}"
      
      echo "Creating GitLab release: ${RELEASE_TAG}"
  release:
    tag_name: 'release-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}'
    name: '${SAFE_MR_TITLE} - ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}'
    description: './RELEASE_NOTES.md'
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: manual
  needs:
    - generate:release_notes
